title: [MTR3/4]Seoul Metro Woojin Trains
description: This resourcepack contains Seoul Metro Woojin Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![seoulmetrotitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf464a063b91b64d6ee895839fe30c434c3775c9_0.webp)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds Seoul Metro Trains (Woojin Heavy Industries) for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway Mod** (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 version (NTE)

## Terms & infos

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars (information could be found in Spreadsheet - could be found at wiki link)

Trains must be setted in even numbers except for free length train (MTR3)

Recommended settings for MTR4: Front cab - carriage - panto - Back cab

## Contents

* Seoul Metro Woojin Trains (Line 4, 5, 7, 8)
